stories.title: Sources: U-M regents to decide on AD Manuel soon
stories.summary: The University of Michigan regents are expected to discuss an investigation into the culture of its athletic department on Thursday, sources told ESPN, and as part of the review, a decision on the future of AD Warde Manuel is expected in the coming days.

stories.title: Sources: Warriors to hire Vogel as associate coach...
stories.summary: The Warriors agreed to hire longtime NBA coach Frank Vogel as the associate head coach under Steve Kerr, league sources told ESPN, filling the void left by the departing Terry Stotts.

stories.title: Dybantsa nets 23 in potential summer league finale...
stories.summary: In what could be his last game of summer league, No. 1 pick AJ Dybantsa scored 23 points to go along with seven rebounds, helping the Washington Wizards remain undefeated with a 104-85 victory over the Sacramento Kings on Sunday night in Las Vegas.
